name: Jamaican Rice and Peas
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Dried red kidney beans (Soaked overnight)
1 Whole Scotch Bonnet Chili (I Usually use several Cayennes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the soaked beans, garlic, and salt in a large pot. Cook until the beans are tender.
2. Reserve three cups of the cooking liquid and discard the garlic.
3. Return the beans and reserved liquid to the pot (add water if necessary). Stir in the coconut milk, scallions, thyme, chili, black pepper, and additional salt to taste.
4. Add the rice to the pot when it comes to a boil. Cook for 20 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and let sit for an additional 15 minutes.
6. Stir gently with a fork before serving. Discard the chili pepper.
